verses.1: A Song of Ascents. “Many times they have attacked me from my youth up,” Let Israel say,
verses.2: “Many times they have attacked me from my youth up; Yet they have not prevailed against me.
verses.3: “The plowers plowed upon my back; They lengthened their furrows.”
verses.4: The LORD is righteous; He has cut up the ropes of the wicked.
verses.5: May all who hate Zion Be put to shame and turned backward;
verses.6: May they be like grass upon the housetops, Which withers before it grows up;
verses.7: With which the harvester does not fill his hand, Or the binder of sheaves his arms;
verses.8: Nor do those who pass by say, “The blessing of the LORD be upon you; We bless you in the name of the LORD.”
